title: Research Associate I
description: At Pfizer, we are driven by breakthroughs that change patients' lives. Our research and development engine is at the heart of everything we do, advancing a diverse pipeline of medicines, vaccines, and therapies that address the world's most pressing health challenges. As a Research Associate I in our Cambridge research facility, you will contribute to early-stage drug discovery programs by executing laboratory experiments, analyzing data, and collaborating with multidisciplinary scientific teams. This is an opportunity to launch your career in pharmaceutical research within a rigorous, innovation-focused environment committed to scientific excellence.
responsibilities: Execute cell-based assays including cell culture maintenance, passage, and experimental setup in support of drug discovery and target validation programs
Perform molecular and immunological techniques including PCR, ELISA, and flow cytometry according to established protocols and GLP compliance standards
Collect, organize, and analyze experimental data using GraphPad Prism, R, or equivalent statistical tools, and present findings to project teams
Maintain accurate and detailed electronic laboratory notebooks and documentation in compliance with Pfizer's research data integrity standards
Contribute to the optimization and troubleshooting of experimental protocols, identifying opportunities to improve assay sensitivity, reproducibility, and throughput
Collaborate with scientists, principal investigators, and cross-functional teams to support pipeline advancement from target identification through lead optimization

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Biology, Biochemistry, Molecular Biology, or a related life sciences discipline

benefits: Comprehensive health insurance including medical, dental, and vision coverage
401(k) retirement plan with competitive company match
Pfizer Employee Stock Purchase Plan (ESPP) at discounted rates
Funding for scientific conference attendance and professional development
